mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS peerId, u.nickname AS peerNickname, u.avatar AS peerAvatar, m.content AS lastMessage, m.message_type AS lastMessageType, m.image_url AS lastImageUrl, m.create_time AS lastMessageTime, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_private_message WHERE sender_id = u.id AND receiver_id = #{currentUserId} AND status = 0 AND receiver_deleted = 0) AS unreadCount FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{currentUserId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END AS peer_id, MAX(id) AS last_message_id FROM biz_private_message WHERE sender_id = #{currentUserId} OR receiver_id = #{currentUserId} GROUP BY peer_id) lastMsg ON lastMsg.peer_id = u.id INNER JOIN biz_private_message m ON m.id = lastMsg.last_message_id ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
